calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Nov-19-2009 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-27-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Angela T. Mitchell, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Hermana J. Grant.
No appearance by defendant Clark Perry.
Default was entered against defendant on April 13, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed June 29, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on 8/24/09.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Hermana J. Grant, and against the Defaulted Defendant Clark Perry as follows:

Compensatory Damages - $76,523.69.
General Damages for Emotional Distress - $50,000.00.
Punitive Damages - $100,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $4,091.00.
Costs - $899.29, for a total judgment in the amount of $231,513.98.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
